My **community_cohesion** score of 0.475 reflects my role as a pillar of the neighborhood—I greet neighbors during morning markets, share harvests at the community center, and attend temple festivals, yet I retreat to my wooden farmhouse at dusk to mend nets or savor quiet moments with a steaming bowl of miso soup. To tend this land like my father did, ensuring our village’s heartbeat remains steady, even as the world rushes past.
